headline: Textron to break off industrial business, focus on aerospace and defense
summary: Once the separation is complete, the manufacturer will focus on its core franchises Textron Aviation, Bell and Textron Systems.

raw.headline: Textron to break off industrial business, focus on aerospace and defense
raw.summary: Once the separation is complete, the manufacturer will focus on its core franchises Textron Aviation, Bell and Textron Systems.

headline: Textron Systems Awarded Contract From Defense Innovation Unit (DIU) To Provide Tsunami USVS To Southcom And U.S. Navy Fourth Fleet
summary: HUNT VALLEY, Md. - Textron Systems Corporation, a Textron Inc. company, announced today a contract award from the Defense Innovation Unit to produce and deliver multiple TSUNAMI Uncrewed Surface...
